category_sources: source_facts.description says annotate a VCF with VCFs/BEDs/tabixed files; official vcfanno docs describe annotating VCFs with INFO fields from VCF, BED, and BAM files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vcfanno; official documentation and GitHub repository use vcfanno.
docs_sources: Official brentp.github.io vcfanno documentation includes overview, usage, examples, operations, installation, and multi-allelic guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/brentp/vcfanno, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official docs describe VCF annotation using VCF/BED/BAM inputs; docs state vcfanno is written in Go.
